profile.name: [Your Name]
profile.description: Starter profile with generic thresholds. Run /voice-check setup to calibrate from your own writing.

qualitative.name: Transitivity check
qualitative.instruction: Are topic sentences using material processes ('I built,' 'I developed') or relational ('This is,' 'These are')? Check the ratio.

qualitative.name: Concept scope
qualitative.instruction: Are key concepts used as ARCHITECTURE (organizing a section) or just VOCABULARY (mentioned and abandoned)?

qualitative.name: Referential strategy
qualitative.instruction: Is the author positioned as an ACTOR who does things, or as a CATEGORY to be identified?

qualitative.name: Argumentation topoi
qualitative.instruction: Does the text lead with authority (credentials) or consequence (what happened, what it means)?

qualitative.name: Theme/Rheme
qualitative.instruction: Are new concepts introduced in subject position (hard to parse) or in predicate position (easier)? Subjects should be simple and familiar.

qualitative.name: Genre moves
qualitative.instruction: Are all expected moves present for this document type?

qualitative.name: Narrative structure
qualitative.instruction: Does each story have orientation, complication, evaluation, and result?
